node.name: MAGIC CREATURES
node.rich_text: Flarestorm Phoenix: ... ... Magnificent avian creature with sunset-colored plumage ... Guardian of Solarforge Nexus ... Embodies the fiery spirit of the Emberglow Age ... Symbol of rebirth and transformation ... Appears during times of great crisis or change ... Feathers have powerful magical properties ... ... Verdant Serpent: ... ... Colossal serpentine creature covered in luminescent vegetation ... Guardian of the ancient forest and Luminara Grove ... Represents the enduring bond between Sylvanids and nature ... Appears to guide worthy seekers with hidden knowledge ... Scale patterns contain maps to lost sacred groves ... Said to be older than the pantheon itself ... ... Tidal Leviathan: ... ... Massive aquatic creature with bioluminescent scales ... Controls ocean currents and tidal forces ... Guardian of the Azure Vortex deep-sea trench ... Symbolizes the power and mystery of the oceans ... Hydralis legends claim it taught their ancestors to survive underwater ... Appears during significant oceanic changes ... ... Galewing Roc: ... ... Colossal bird with wings spanning miles ... Creates and controls powerful storms ... Guardian of Stormshaper Nexus ... Embodies the atmospheric forces of the Stormborn Era ... Feathers used in weather prediction devices ... Venturan legends tell of ancient pacts with these beings ... ... Crystalith Behemoth: ... ... Terrestrial creature encased in living crystal ... Walks the Emberwind Territories ... Guardian of geological stability ... Its movements affect volcanic and seismic activity ... Crystal fragments have powerful energy conduction properties ... Appears during times of planetary instability
